dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
Agent!
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
Agent.help
Agent.app.toddbruss.help
AppIcon
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_PACKAGE_TYPE)
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
public.app-category.utilities
$(MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET)
© 2026 agent@macos26.app
Agent! needs to control other apps to run automation scripts on your behalf.
Agent! needs Apple Music access for scripts that read your music library metadata via the MediaPlayer framework.
Agent! needs Bluetooth access for scripts that interact with Bluetooth devices.
Agent! needs calendar access for scripts that read or create events.
Agent! needs camera access for scripts that capture photos.
Agent! needs contacts access for scripts that query your address book.
Agent! reads and writes files in your Desktop folder for screenshots, downloads, and scripts that operate on Desktop items.
Agent! reads and writes files in your Documents folder to manage agent scripts, system prompts, AppleScripts, journal entries, and the SDEF catalog under ~/Documents/AgentScript.
Agent! reads and writes files in your Downloads folder for scripts that process downloaded files.
Agent! needs biometric authentication for scripts that use Touch ID or Face ID.
Agent! needs HealthKit read access for scripts that summarize your health and fitness data.
Agent! needs HealthKit write access for scripts that log workouts or add health samples.
Agent! needs HomeKit access for scripts that control smart home accessories and scenes.
Agent! needs local network access for scripts that discover devices on your network.
Agent! needs location access for scripts that use GPS data.
Agent! needs location access for scripts that use GPS data.
Agent! needs microphone access for speech-to-text dictation and scripts that record audio.
Agent! needs network volume access for scripts that read or write files on SMB and AFP shares.
Agent! needs photo library access for scripts that read or save photos.
Agent! needs reminders access for scripts that manage reminders.
Agent! needs removable volume access for scripts that read or write files on USB drives, SD cards, and external disks.
Agent! needs Siri access for scripts that run Shortcuts and donate suggestions.
Agent! needs speech recognition to transcribe your voice into the task input field.
Agent! needs system administration access for scripts that perform privileged system configuration.
